task_completion.description: Create a Teaching Kitchen with at least 8 student workstations and 1 instructor demo station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A designated kitchen area containing at least 8 distinct workstations (each consisting of an oven/cooker and a prep table/counter) plus 1 additional instructor demo station.

task_completion.description: Create an enclosed Lecture Room with seating for at least 12 students and an instructor desk.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A room enclosed by walls containing at least 12 chairs or seats arranged for students, along with an instructor desk.

task_completion.description: Create a Walk-in Pantry/Bulk Storage area with at least 6 shelving units/cabinets and at least 3 commercial refrigerators/freezers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A storage area containing at least 6 shelving units or cabinets and at least 3 refrigerators or freezers.

task_completion.description: Create a Sanitation/Dishwashing Zone with at least 4 large sinks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A designated sanitation area containing at least 4 large sinks. (Dishwashers may be present but are not strictly required for scoring).

task_completion.description: Partition the zones with walls and doors, and label each room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Newly placed walls and doors separating the four distinct zones, with visible text labels identifying each room (e.g., Teaching Kitchen, Lecture Room, Pantry, Sanitation).

task_completion.description: Include at least 2 dimension lines between kitchen workstations and save the file as culinary_institute.sh3d.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least 2 dimension lines drawn between the kitchen workstations to document aisle clearances, and the Sweet Home 3D window title or save dialog showing the file saved as 'culinary_institute.sh3d' in /home/ga/Documents/.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sweet Home 3D GUI to create the layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Sweet Home 3D application open with the layout being actively edited, rather than a script or text editor.

integrity.description: The layout features genuine 3D objects and architectural elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The layout contains actual 3D furniture models, walls, and dimension lines native to Sweet Home 3D, not 2D drawings or pasted images.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply open a completed file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Trajectory shows the progressive placement of walls, doors, furniture, and labels over time.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires 4 distinct zones. For the Sanitation/Dishwashing Zone, although the prompt asks for at least 2 dishwashers, the underlying scoring logic completely ignores the dishwasher count; only the 4 large sinks are strictly required to pass this specific criterion. Ensure newly placed walls, doors, tables, chairs, ovens, shelves, fridges, sinks, zone identifiers, and dimension lines are present as they are explicitly tracked by the verifier.
